reason: Browser-use feature successfully opens browser, navigates to URL, retrieves page title, and reports findings with "Example Domain" confirmation
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent home with three agents in sidebar
Clicked on "QA-20260515-212417-98bd" agent in main content area — Agent page opened with chat interface ready
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into input field — Message appeared correctly in text input
Clicked "Send message" button — Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working"
Waited 5 seconds for response — Agent completed task in 14 seconds total
Verified response content — Response shows "The page title is "Example Domain"." confirming successful browser navigation and page title retrieval
